title: Daily Summary — 2026-05-03
body:
## Recent Activity

Synced window: 2026-05-02T11:35:44Z to 2026-05-03T11:35:44Z. Signals show 31 issues, 19 PRs, 1 discussion, and 0 commits updated.

Activity centered on the #107 distribution plan: scheduled Sepo update checks, failed-agent-run reporting to Discussions, and several orchestration robustness fixes. Many older orchestration issues were closed as related PRs merged.

## Recently Active PRs

- Open: [#116 Add scheduled Sepo update checks](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/116) reached a `SHIP` review verdict after fix-pr addressed timeout wiring, gate assertions, and delimiter-safe outputs.
- Open: [#117 Report failed agent runs to Discussions](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/117) remains unresolved. Review found one small required fix: add `continue-on-error: true` to the `failure_report_auth` step; the automated fix-pr returned `no_changes`.
- Open: [#62 Add first-run onboarding setup workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62) was updated but was not the main focus of the synced activity.
- Merged: [#82](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/82), [#85](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/85), [#89](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/89), [#91](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/91), [#97](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/97), [#100](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/100), [#102](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/102), [#108](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/108), [#110](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/110), [#112](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/112), and [#114](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/114).
- Closed without merge: [#66](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/66), [#77](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/77), [#81](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/81), [#113](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/113), and [#115](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/115).

## Recently Active Issues

- [#107 User facing function / distribution](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/107) is the active umbrella. It completed child #27 via PR #116, then paused on child #26 / PR #117 after fix-pr returned `no_changes`.
- [#27 Automatically check sepo agent updates](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/27) produced PR #116 and was reported ready to ship.
- [#26 Automatically report issues on GitHub](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/26) produced PR #117 but is blocked on the remaining failure-report auth hardening.
- [#94 Automatic updating on the user side](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/94) remains open; its prior child PR #115 was closed/failed, and the requester moved the orchestration to #27.
- New or updated open planning issues include [#103](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/103), [#104](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/104), [#105](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/105), [#106](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/106), and [#111](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/111).
- Several orchestration/runtime issues were closed in the window, including [#43](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/43), [#51](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/51), [#70](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/70), [#72](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/72), [#86](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/86), [#90](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/90), and [#95](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/95).

## Recently Active Discussions

- [#80 Daily Summary — 2026-05-02](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/discussions/80) was updated with project-management summaries and a Q&A noting that `/orchestrate` does not work end-to-end inside Discussions today; it needs an issue/PR target or a bridge to a tracking issue.

## Follow-ups

1. Fix PR #117 by adding `continue-on-error: true` to `failure_report_auth`, then re-review.
2. Decide whether PR #116 should be merged now that synced reviews mark it `SHIP`.
3. Resume #107 after PR #117 is repaired, or explicitly pause it for manual handling.

---
*Generated by the agent-daily-summary workflow*

## Project Management Summary

- Mode: `labels applied`
- Open items assessed: `29 issues, 4 pull requests`
- Managed labels: `priority/*`, `effort/*`

### Top Triage Queue

- `pull_request#117` Report failed agent runs to Discussions — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  High-impact child of the active distribution plan; currently blocked after a failed fix-pr pass for a small but important best-effort failure-reporting hardening change. Label changes: add `priority/p1`, `effort/high`.

- `issue#107` User facing function / distribution — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Active parent plan coordinating onboarding, updates, and bug-report intake; currently paused on PR #117 clarification. Label changes: none.

- `issue#26` Automatically report issues on GitHub — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Important bug-report intake work under #107, with PR #117 open and needing follow-up. Label changes: none.

- `pull_request#116` Add scheduled Sepo update checks — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Ready-to-ship PR for scheduled infrastructure update checks under the distribution plan. Label changes: none.

- `pull_request#62` Add first-run onboarding setup workflow — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Major onboarding workflow improvement for installed repositories, with active review history. Label changes: none.

- `issue#104` Misc orchestrator fixes — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Active parent orchestration issue that has already produced stacked PRs for core orchestrator UX improvements. Label changes: none.

- `issue#23` Agent should create tags upon install/first run — `priority/p1`, `effort/high`  
  Onboarding/setup issue with implemented PR #62; high impact for new repo adoption. Label changes: none.

- `issue#75` Agent review-body commands can be cancelled by sibling inline review-comment events — `priority/p1`, `effort/medium`  
  Concrete event-handling bug that can drop user commands; important but localized. Label changes: none.

- `pull_request#15` Add minimal add-rubrics route with dedicated workflow — `priority/p2`, `effort/high`  
  Valuable route addition with remaining review concerns and stale discussion; less urgent than active distribution blockers. Label changes: none.

- `issue#106` Advanced orchestrator functions — `priority/p2`, `effort/high`  
  Broad future orchestrator capability work around parallel tasks and waiting; valuable but not currently the top blocker. Label changes: none.

### Label Changes

One open pull request was missing managed labels and should receive the selected priority and effort labels. All other assessed items already had one managed priority label and one managed effort label consistent with current triage.

```json

  "label_changes": [
    {
      "kind": "pull_request",

      "remove": []

```

### Notes

- No labels were mutated by the agent; this summary emits the deterministic managed-label plan for the workflow to apply.
- PR #117 is the clearest immediate follow-up: retry or manually apply the requested `continue-on-error: true` change for the `failure_report_auth` step, then re-review.
- Issue #107 should remain paused until the PR #117 child failure is resolved or explicitly skipped.

### Managed Label Application

- Applied 2 managed priority/effort label operation(s).
